summary: Smart cursor UX feature testing: Verified that Pan/Edit mode toggle buttons have been removed from all three maps (DailyGateSessionsPage, GateMapPage, DailySessionsPage), smart cursor hints are displayed, and maps function correctly. Fixed a critical missing useRef import in MapCanvas.jsx.

critical_bug_fixed.issue: useRef was not imported from React. 'hasPannedRef = useRef(false)' at line 103 would throw ReferenceError at runtime, breaking DailySessionsPage map entirely.
critical_bug_fixed.fix: Added useRef to import: 'import { useState, useRef } from "react";'

daily_gate_sessions_page.hint_text: اسحب الباب لتغيير موقعه • اسحب الخلفية للتنقل

gate_map_page.hint_text: اسحب النقطة لتغيير موقعها • اسحب الخلفية للتنقل

action_items: Optional cleanup: Remove dead 'if (mapMode === "pan") return null;' check in MapToolbar.jsx MapInstructions function (line 503) since pan mode no longer exists as a user-selectable mode
context_for_next_testing_agent: Smart cursor UX feature fully implemented and tested. DailyGateSessionsPage, GateMapPage, and DailySessionsPage all have Pan/Edit toggle buttons removed and replaced with smart cursor behavior (drag on marker/gate = move, drag on background = pan). The MapCanvas.jsx critical bug (missing useRef import) was fixed. All pages load correctly with no JS errors.
